name: Sprint 6

dates.duration_note: Opened 2026-06-10 by Team Lead directive. EXEC-065 (update false-positive-drift fix) pulled grill-skipping as a bug fix; the rest of sprint-6 scope (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks) awaits the upcoming Work Grill before issues are filed and pulled.

goal: Ship the update false-positive-drift fix (EXEC-065) and the sprint-6 scope set by the upcoming Work Grill (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks).

not_shipped.title: EXEC-065: Scaffolder update stops false-positive drift when a file matches the incoming template
not_shipped.summary: update() classifies a file drifted whenever its current hash differs from the recorded stamped hash, even when byte-identical to the incoming template, and carries the stale anchor forward. Fix: when currentHash === templateHash, classify unchanged and record templateHash before the drift check. Dogfood: 8 of 9 reported-drifted files were identical to the template.
not_shipped.notes: Grill-skipping local bug fix pulled by Team Lead directive 2026-06-10.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-066: Template ships .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/; stamp policy classes both work-tracking
not_shipped.summary: The two ADR-0008 record homes ship on every fresh init: .excn/progress/ (agent/gate-written) and .excn/runtime/ (hook-written). Stamp policy classifies both as work-tracking so update never touches their contents; the existing *_progress.json gitignore line covers records at any depth with no edit. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-067: hooks, doctor, viewer-server read and write Runtime Records under .excn/runtime/
not_shipped.summary: Hook-written state becomes Runtime Records: invocation heartbeat ledger, viewer-server pid record, gate-watch state all move to .excn/runtime/. doctor heartbeat checks and the viewer-server daemon read the new home; no hook writes any *_progress.json at the .excn base. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-068: Verdict Ledger schema — gates' append shape validates strictly
not_shipped.summary: New verdict-ledger.schema.json defines the append-only array of gate verdicts (step, at, artifact, summary). The session Verdict Ledger and a sprint record's step_log share the entry shape; sprint.schema.json references it rather than duplicating. progress.schema.json unchanged for trackers. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-069: migrate command relocates Progress/Runtime Records; doctor flags the legacy flat layout
not_shipped.summary: New Scaffolder migrate command relocates known records on an already-stamped Instance into their ADR-0008 homes: versioned migration table, idempotent re-run, location-only (byte-identical), every move reported. doctor detects the legacy flat layout and names migrate. update's never-touch-work-tracking contract unchanged. package-qa rubric extended (chartered, alignment-gated per ADR-0004). Dogfood root migrated as proof. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-070: progress-location deny guard — misfiled Progress Record writes denied with a redirect
not_shipped.summary: PreToolUse guard in the spawn-guard pattern denies a *_progress.json write outside .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/, redirect reason naming the right home. Rules/decision split, hooks.config toggle, every firing invocation-logged, fail-safe on any error. Location only — schema and content stay the gates' job. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-071: viewer sprint switcher — past sprints readable from the status page
not_shipped.summary: The viewer gains a sprint switcher over the sprint files it already probes: active sprint renders by default; selecting a closed sprint renders the same lanes plus its decisions, retrospective notes, and step_log gate verdicts. No server change; viewer stays read-only over .excn JSON. Src-First, verified on the live viewer server.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-072: viewer hook health — doctor-parity cards plus the invocation log
not_shipped.summary: The viewer renders per-feature hook health cards mirroring doctor (firing / stale / disabled, last heartbeat) from the Runtime Record invocation ledger, with a collapsible recent-invocations table filterable by feature and outcome. Missing/empty ledger renders an explicit empty state. Src-First, verified on the live viewer server.

step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. ADR-0008 and CONTEXT.md grill-time additions conform to all Principles and project Philosophy.
PASS — 0 violations. Digest filename convention change (<prd-id> → <prd-id>-<prd-slug>) conforms to all Principles and project Philosophy; tied to a real retro observation.

retrospective_notes.title: Sprint-6 scope is grill-pending; EXEC-065 pulled ahead of it
retrospective_notes.body: The Work Grill for the rest of sprint-6 scope (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks) has not run yet. EXEC-065 is a grill-skipping bug fix pulled into sprint 6 by Team Lead directive on 2026-06-10; the remaining scope is filed and pulled only after the grill runs.

retrospective_notes.title: npm 0.3.0 lagged HEAD at the same version number (PRD-009 grill)
retrospective_notes.body: The published npm 0.3.0 lagged HEAD while carrying the same version number — template content changed without a version bump, so consumers on 0.3.0 silently missed it. Candidate: a preflight guard forcing a version bump when template content changes. Philosophy/process candidate carried for the Retro Loop.
